title: Charter Communications, Inc. (CHTR) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Charter Communications, Inc. (NASDAQ:CHTR ) Q2 2023 Earnings Conference Call July 28, 2023 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Stefan Anninger - IR Chris Winfrey - President and CEO Tom Rutledge - Executive Chairman Jessica Fischer - CFO Conference Call Participants Ben Swinburne - Morgan Stanley Phil Cusick - JPMorgan John Hodulik - UBS Jonathan Chaplin - New Street Brett Feldman - Goldman Sachs Craig Moffett - MoffettNathanson Vijay Jayant - Evercore Bryan Kraft - Deutsche Bank Michael Rollins - Citi Operator Hello, and welcome to Charter Communications' Second Quarter 2023 Investor Call. [Operator Instructions] Also, as a reminder, this conference call is being recorded today.

title: Charter (CHTR) Q2 Earnings Beat, Internet User Base Up Y/Y
text: Charter's (CHTR) second-quarter 2023 results reflect continued growth in Internet and mobile service revenues.

title: Here's What Key Metrics Tell Us About Charter (CHTR) Q2 Earnings
text: The headline numbers for Charter (CHTR) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended June 2023, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: Charter Communications (CHTR) Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates
text: Charter Communications (CHTR) came out with quarterly earnings of $8.05 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $7.66 per share. This compares to earnings of $8.80 per share a year ago.

title: Charter earnings bring internet subscriber gains, while video subscribers keep falling
text: The company generated second-quarter net income of $1.2 billion, or $8.05 a share, compared with net income of $1.5 billion, or $8.80 a share, in the year-before quarter. Analysts tracked by FactSet were expecting $8.06 a share.

title: Charter Announces Second Quarter 2023 Results
text: STAMFORD, Conn. , July 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Charter Communications, Inc. (along with its subsidiaries, the "Company" or "Charter") today reported financial and operating results for the three and six months ended June 30, 2023.

title: Cell Tower REITs: Toxic Telecom?
text: Cell Tower REITs have been the weakest-performing property sector since the start of 2022 - lagging even the battered office sector - amid a telecommunications industry-wide slump inflamed by tight monetary conditions. Cellular carriers have curbed their capital-intensive network expansion plans in recent quarters following a significant wave of investment and tower equipment upgrades from 2019-2022 to deploy nationwide 5G networks. The latest selloff was intensified by an expose alleging that century-old abandoned phone lines owned by AT&T and Verizon are leaching toxic lead into drinking water, potentially requiring costly remediation.

title: What's in Store for Charter Communications' (CHTR) Q2 Earnings?
text: Charter Communications' (CHTR) second-quarter 2023 performance is likely to have benefited from expanding broadband network, despite stiff competition and slow subscriber addition.

title: CHARTER PROMOTES DANNY BOWMAN TO EVP, PRODUCT
text: STAMFORD, Conn. , July 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Charter Communications, Inc. (NASDAQ: CHTR) today announced that Danny Bowman has been promoted to Executive Vice President, Product.

title: Analysts Estimate Charter Communications (CHTR) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
text: Charter (CHTR) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Will Charter's New Plan To Stave Off Cord Cutting Work?
text: Many consumers have been fed up with the high cost of cable and have been cord cutting (leaving for streaming TV only) or cord shaving (moving to a lower priced package).

title: Charter will offer a cheaper cable TV option without sports to reflect changing landscape
text: Charter Communications said it's revamping its cable TV model, allowing customers to opt into a cheaper, sports-free package.

title: Charter to Hold Webcast to Discuss Second Quarter 2023 Financial and Operating Results
text: STAMFORD, Conn. , July 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Charter Communications, Inc. (NASDAQ: CHTR) (the "Company" or "Charter") will host a webcast on Friday, July 28, 2023 at 8:30 a.m.

title: The 3 Best Stocks to Invest in Before Biden's Broadband Plan Takes Off
text: As part of the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act, President Joe Biden has kicked off more than $42 billion to accelerate high-speed internet access, thus boding well for so-called Biden broadband stocks. According to CNBC, the effort aims to provide the aforementioned access to every American household by 2030.

title: Charter stock on track to dial up longest winning streak in 22 months
text: Shares of Charter Communications Inc. CHTR, +0.66% were ahead 0.6% in Monday morning action, putting the stock on track to rise for its seventh session in a row. A positive close for Charter would clinch the cable name's longest winning streak since Sept.

title: The 7 Most Undervalued Buffett Stocks to Buy Now: June 2023
text: Plenty of investors are interested in the stocks that legendary investor Warren Buffett has selected for the Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRK-A , NYSE: BRK-B ) equity portfolio. However, instead of buying every single stock in this category, you may want to focus mainly on the undervalued Buffett stocks instead.
